title.en: Elephant at an Awkward Dinner Party

description.en: An editorial reconstruction of Meta's official preview clip, designed to test scale, occlusion, reactions, and room continuity in one comic shot.

content.en: A photorealistic elephant stands improbably inside a small, warmly lit dining room during a formal dinner party. Six adults sit around a table with roast dinner, candles, flowers, and wine glasses. The elephant fills the back of the room without breaking the walls or furniture; its trunk reaches forward as the guests notice it and react with restrained surprise, then laughter. One continuous eye-level shot with subtle handheld drift, natural eyelines, believable contact shadows, consistent elephant scale, warm practical lamps, room tone, quiet cutlery, chair movement, and a soft elephant breath. No cuts, no duplicated guests, no changing table layout.

title.en: Baby Panda Tumbles Down a Grassy Slope

description.en: Meta's concise animal-motion prompt, useful for studying body continuity, contact physics, fur, and natural outdoor camera response.

content.en: A baby panda tumbling head over heels down a small grassy slope.

title.en: Four-Orange Juggle With a Comic Payoff

description.en: A complete ten-second arc that combines counting, hand-object interaction, failure, performance, natural physics, and synchronized foley.

content.en: A man juggles three oranges, adds a fourth, drops them all, and takes a bow anyway. Warm natural morning light, gentle slow motion. A single continuous approximately 10-second moment with a clear beginning, turn, and payoff. AUDIO: quiet room tone with crisp foley. Photorealistic, natural lighting and physics, believable real-world footage. Not a cartoon, not stylized.

title.en: Exactly Five Ducklings Climb a Step

description.en: A strict continuity prompt that keeps five animals stable while one delayed action creates a beginning, obstacle, and resolution.

content.en: A mother duck leads a line of exactly FIVE ducklings toward a curb; the fifth and smallest duckling struggles at the step, then hops up to rejoin the others. There are exactly five ducklings in total — the same five throughout the entire video. Never add, remove, duplicate, or change the number of ducklings; keep all five visible and consistent from start to finish. Cozy indoor lamplight, authentic home-video look, slightly imperfect handheld framing with natural shake. One continuous approximately 10-second moment with a clear beginning, obstacle, and payoff. Audio: soft webbed footsteps, tiny chirps, room tone, a small scrape at the curb, then a bright chirp when the last duckling succeeds.

title.en: Night Walk Beside a Half-Frozen Pond

description.en: An immersive first-person scene organized around handheld gait, snow, reflections, ambient sound, and a calm uninterrupted viewpoint.

content.en: First-person point of view strolling along the edge of a small half-frozen pond in a snowy suburban park at night. Snow-dusted reeds and cattails line the bank; fresh snow falls gently. Warm orange lamplight reflects softly on the dark open water. Serene and peaceful, with quiet nature sounds: the faint trickle of unfrozen water, a soft breeze through the reeds, distant snow-muffled stillness, and gentle footsteps in the snow. Natural handheld walking camera, cinematic, meditative.
